meta.description: APLS-class universe expansion — Faza 3 seed observation CONSERVATIVE. 6 commercial-stage mid-cap biotech (FDA-approved drug + wysoka aktywność Form 4). Backtest Faza 2 (24 mies.): BUY $500K+ 7d d=+0.75 p=0.041 — replikuje V5 core. Threshold alertów: BUY >= $500K (vs core $100K). Observation 30d, Faza 4 review: 2026-07-09.

companies.name: UroGen Pharma
companies.notes: FDA-approved Zusduri + Jelmyto (bladder cancer). Cap ~$1.4B. Form 4: 27/365d. APLS strict tier (Faza 1.A PASS).

companies.name: Ardelyx
companies.notes: FDA-approved IBSRELA + XPHOZAH. Cap ~$1.5B. Form 4: 52/365d. Główny driver edge'u w backteście Faza 2 (1d d=+1.19 p=0.028). APLS strict tier.

companies.name: MannKind
companies.notes: FDA-approved Afrezza (insulina wziewna) + royalty Tyvaso DPI. Cap ~$1.0B. Form 4: 41/365d. APLS strict tier.

companies.name: CRISPR Therapeutics
companies.notes: FDA-approved Casgevy (sickle cell, 2023, partner Vertex). Cap ~$4.9B. Form 4: 42/365d. APLS strict tier — jedyny commercial-stage gene editing (BEAM/EDIT/NTLA odrzucone jako pre-revenue).

companies.name: Axsome Therapeutics
companies.notes: FDA-approved Auvelity + Sunosi. Cap ~$12B (stretch: powyżej progu $10B). Form 4: 42/365d. APLS stretch tier — backtest nie wykazał różnicy vs strict (p>0.66, N małe).

companies.name: Rocket Pharmaceuticals
companies.notes: FDA-approved KRESLADI (03.2026). Cap ~$0.3B (stretch: poniżej progu $1B). Form 4: 51/365d. Backtest: extreme avg returns (+7 do +13%) ale szerokie CI (N=4). APLS stretch tier.
